title: Why a crude oil crisis could play out differently for India’s economy this time
description: India’s economy, like the world’s, is structurally less vulnerable to oil shocks than it was back in the 1970s. But with war-driven supply disruptions pushing up costs, policymakers must respond. Supply shocks are far harder to tackle than demand shocks.
